nasb.text: What I am saying, I am not saying as the Lord would, but as in foolishness, in this confidence of boasting.

esv.text: What I am saying with this boastful confidence, I say not as the Lord would but as a fool.

cnv.text: 我這樣滿有自信地誇口，不是照著主所吩咐的，而是好像愚昧人在說話。

ccb.text: 我这样说，并不是主的意思，而是像一个傻瓜一样夸口。

csbs.text: 我现在所说的，不是按照主说的，而是像一个愚妄人那样自信夸耀。
